audit_items.proof_trace: damon_sysfs_targets_release contains no allocations and no error paths — it is a void kobject release callback that calls a single kfree on the container struct. The only associated heap field, targets_arr, is always NULL when the release fires: in initialization-error paths the struct was just kzalloc-ed (targets_arr=0), and in all teardown paths damon_sysfs_targets_rm_dirs (which frees and NULLs targets_arr) is called before kobject_put on the targets kobj — confirmed at damon_sysfs_context_rm_dirs lines 1810-1811.
